notes_md:
**thu hút** = to attract, draw in, or pull attention toward something. It’s about making people feel interested or pulled closer.

It’s a **verb**, usually used for people, customers, attention, interest, investment, etc. You’ll often see it with abstract things like *sự chú ý* (attention) or *sự quan tâm* (interest).


Close words: **hấp dẫn** (attractive, more about quality) and **lôi cuốn** (captivating, stronger emotional pull). Opposite idea: **xua đuổi** (to drive away).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He always knows how to dress in an attractive way at work.
This coffee shop is decorated beautifully so it is very attractive to customers.
I think this new idea will be attractive to many people to join.

translation.en: The presentation was very attractive to the audience.

content.sentence: Bài thuyết trình rất ___ khán giả.

example.es: Ella tiene la capacidad de atraer a todos a su alrededor.
example.en: She has the ability to attract everyone around her.
example.vi: Cô ấy có khả năng thu hút mọi người xung quanh.

definitions.vi: Kéo vào hoặc thu hút sự quan tâm hoặc chú ý.
definitions.en: To draw in or engage interest or attention.
definitions.es: Atraer o captar el interés o la atención.

content.sentence: Chương trình này rất ___ mọi người.

translation.en: This program is very attractive to everyone.

exampleSentences: Anh ấy luôn biết cách ăn mặc rất thu hút khi đi làm.
Quán cà phê này được trang trí đẹp nên rất thu hút khách.
Chị nghĩ ý tưởng mới này sẽ thu hút nhiều người tham gia.
notes:
thu hút = to attract, draw in, or pull attention toward something. It’s about making people feel interested or pulled closer.

It’s a verb, usually used for people, customers, attention, interest, investment, etc. You’ll often see it with abstract things like sự chú ý (attention) or sự quan tâm (interest).

Close words: hấp dẫn (attractive, more about quality) and lôi cuốn (captivating, stronger emotional pull). Opposite idea: xua đuổi (to drive away).
